Title: Product Variations - Size Selection
Preconditions: Product with size variations (S/M/L/XL)
Steps:
1. [NAV] Navigate to product with size variations (e.g., T-Shirt)
2. [ASSERT] Verify size selector displays
3. [ASSERT] Verify all sizes listed (S, M, L, XL)
4. [ACT] Click size 'M'
5. [ASSERT] Verify size M is selected (highlighted)
6. [ASSERT] Verify Add to Cart is enabled
7. [ACT] Click Add to Cart
8. [NAV] Navigate to cart
9. [ASSERT] Verify selected size shown in cart
Assertions:
[DOM] Size selector element is visible
[STATE] Size 'M' is selected with visual highlight
[STATE] Add to Cart button is enabled
[DOM] Cart line displays: Product Name - Size: M
[DOM] Correct SKU for selected size variant shown
[FORMAT] Price correct for selected size variant
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mutation errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no uncaught JS errors
Failure_Signals: Size selector does not display; incorrect size shown in cart; Add to Cart not enabled after size selection; cart shows wrong SKU

Title: Product Variations - Color Selection
Preconditions: Product with color variations
Steps:
1. [NAV] Navigate to product with colors (e.g., Blue, Red, Black, White)
2. [ASSERT] Verify color selector displays
3. [ACT] Click color 'Blue'
4. [ASSERT] Verify Blue is selected
5. [ASSERT] Verify product image updates to blue variant
6. [ACT] Click Add to Cart
7. [NAV] Navigate to cart
Assertions:
[DOM] Color selector is visible (swatches or dropdown)
[DOM] Color swatches show actual colors
[STATE] Blue color is selected (border or checkmark indicator)
[DOM] Main product image updated to blue variant
[DOM] Cart shows: Product Name - Color: Blue
[DOM] Correct color variant SKU in cart
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mutation errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no uncaught JS errors
Failure_Signals: Color selector missing; image does not update on color change; wrong color variant SKU in cart

Title: Product Variations - Multi-Attribute (Size + Color)
Preconditions: Product with size and color variations
Steps:
1. [NAV] Navigate to configurable product
2. [ASSERT] Verify both size and color selectors display
3. [ACT] Select Size: M
4. [ASSERT] Verify color options update to only colors available in size M
5. [ACT] Select Color: Blue
6. [ASSERT] Verify price updates for M/Blue variant
7. [ASSERT] Verify stock status is shown
8. [ACT] Click Add to Cart
9. [NAV] Navigate to cart
Assertions:
[DOM] Both size and color selectors visible
[STATE] Selecting size M filters color options to valid combinations only
[FORMAT] Variant-specific price displayed
[DOM] Stock status shown (In Stock / Low Stock / Out of Stock)
[STATE] Add to Cart disabled until all required attributes selected
[DOM] Cart shows: Product - Size: M, Color: Blue
[DOM] Correct variant SKU and price in cart
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mutation errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no uncaught JS errors
Failure_Signals: Invalid attribute combinations selectable; price not updating on variant change; cart shows wrong SKU or attribute combo

Title: Product Variations - Out of Stock Variant
Preconditions: Product with some variants out of stock

2. [ACT] Select size that is out of stock
3. [ASSERT] Verify out of stock message displayed
4. [ASSERT] Verify Add to Cart is disabled
5. [ACT] Select different size (in stock)

Assertions:
[DOM] Out of stock variant visible but disabled or grayed
[DOM] Message shown: 'This variant is out of stock' or equivalent
[STATE] Add to Cart button disabled for out of stock variant
[STATE] Add to Cart button enabled after selecting in-stock variant
[DOM] Stock status badge visible per variant
Failure_Signals: Out of stock variant not grayed; Add to Cart enabled for OOS variant; no out of stock message shown

Title: Product Variations - Price Updates by Variant
Preconditions: Product with variant-specific pricing (e.g., size affects price)
Steps:
1. [NAV] Navigate to product with size-based pricing
2. [ASSERT] Note default price (e.g., $29.99 for size S)
3. [ACT] Select size L
4. [ASSERT] Verify price updates (e.g., $34.99)
5. [ACT] Select size XL
6. [ASSERT] Verify price updates again (e.g., $39.99)
7. [ACT] Add to cart
8. [ASSERT] Verify cart price matches variant price
Assertions:
[FORMAT] Default price displays for default or first variant
[FORMAT] Selecting different variant updates price immediately
[MATH] Cart line price matches selected variant price
[MATH] Checkout total uses correct variant pricing
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] mutation errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no uncaught JS errors
Failure_Signals: Price does not update on variant change; cart shows incorrect price for selected variant

Title: Product Variations - Add Multiple Variants to Cart

[MATH] Subtotal sums both variants correctly

[API] mutation errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no uncaught JS errors

Title: Product Variations - Variant URL Parameters
Preconditions: Product with variations
Steps:

2. [ACT] Select Size: L, Color: Black
3. [ASSERT] Check URL for variant params (e.g., ?size=L&color=Black)
4. [ACT] Copy URL and open in new tab
5. [NAV] Navigate to copied variant URL
6. [ASSERT] Verify correct variant pre-selected on load
Assertions:
[NAV] URL updates with human-readable variant parameters
[STATE] Opening variant URL pre-selects that variant
[NAV] Back button works correctly after variant URL changes
Failure_Signals: URL does not update with variant params; direct variant URL does not pre-select the variant; URL uses internal IDs instead of readable names

Title: VcVariantPickerGroup - All Variant Options Render Correctly
Preconditions: Product with multiple variation options (size, colour), Storybook changes deployed
Steps:
1. [NAV] Navigate to product with size and colour variants
2. [ASSERT] Observe the variant picker UI (colour swatches, size buttons)
3. [ACT] Click various variant options
4. [ASSERT] Verify visual feedback for selected, unselected, and disabled states
Assertions:
[DOM] All variant options render (no blank spaces or broken swatches)
[STATE] Selected state visually distinct (border, checkmark, or fill)
[STATE] Unselected state clearly differs from selected
[STATE] Disabled or out-of-stock variant shown grayed
[DOM] No visual regression from Storybook StoryFn to StoryObj migration
Failure_Signals: Blank swatches; broken variant picker; selected/unselected states visually identical; OOS variants not grayed

[CONSOLE] no uncaught JS errors
